description: Before/after inter-frame coregistration flicker GIFs (reference<->frame, B04) for the national 512 re-grid: raw M1 grid-snap vs mutual-information (M2). Each pair shows the same frame before and after MI coregistration.
source_data: /data/_national_dryrun spectral_precoreg (raw M1 frames from the 5-tile dry-run; zero-PU re-process, no re-fetch)
method: imint.coregistration.estimate_mi_offset — mutual information maximised over a continuous sub-pixel shift (Powell); shift applied with the Fourier subpixel_shift

files.44063896_f2_before.gif / _after.gif: 0.77 px -> 0.02 px (phase correlation had amplified this frame to 1.84 px)
